papers.title: Photoperiod Control of Gibberellin Levels and Flowering in Sorghum
papers.authors: Foster KR, Morgan PW
papers.note: Step 1 cited this DOI in edges E071, E072 and tests T030, T073 but never listed the paper in candidate_papers.json. Added to close the provenance gap.

papers.title: An Agrobacterium-delivered CRISPR/Cas9 system for targeted mutagenesis in sorghum (Sobic.010G045100 florigen FT locus)
papers.authors: Char SN, Wei J, Mu Q, Li X, Zhang ZJ, Yu J, Yang B
papers.note: Step 1 cited this DOI in test T013 but never listed the paper. CRISPR KO at Sobic.010G045100 (SbFT paralog) delays flowering 8-10 days.

papers.title: OsELF3-1, an ortholog of Arabidopsis early flowering 3, regulates rice circadian rhythm and photoperiodic flowering
papers.authors: Zhao J, Huang X, Ouyang X, Chen W, Du A, Zhu L, Wang S, Deng XW, Li S
papers.note: Rice ortholog mechanism paper — OsELF3-1 represses OsPRR1/37/73/95 and Ghd7; oself3-1 flowers earlier under LD. Used for SbELF3-SbPRR37/SbGhd7 edges by ortholog inference.

papers.title: The evening complex integrates photoperiod signals to control flowering in rice
papers.authors: Andrade L, Lu Y, Cordeiro A, Costa MMR, Wigge PA, Saibo NJM, Jaeger KE
papers.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
papers.note: Paywalled; abstract confirms rice Evening Complex (OsELF3/4, OsLUX) directly represses Ghd7 and OsPRR37 and that OsPhyB inactivates OsELF3 post-translationally.

papers.title: Ghd8 controls rice photoperiod sensitivity by forming a complex that interacts with Ghd7
papers.authors: Wang L, Sun S, Jin J, Fu D, Yang X, Weng X, Xu C, Li X, Xiao J, Zhang Q
papers.note: GHD8-OsHAP5b-HD1 heterotrimer directly binds Ghd7 promoter (CCAAT boxes at -355 and -1603 bp); Hd1-Ghd7 cooperative repression of Ehd1 and Hd3a. Used as mechanism reference for the E092 (SbHd1→SbGhd7) evidence append.

papers.title: Ehd1, a B-type response regulator in rice, confers short-day promotion of flowering and controls FT-like gene expression independently of Hd1
papers.authors: Doi K, Izawa T, Fuse T, Yamanouchi U, Kubo T, Shimatani Z, Yano M, Yoshimura A
papers.note: Founding Ehd1 paper. Ehd1 activates Hd3a and RFT1 under SD independently of Hd1; possible direct binding sites in promoters noted.

papers.title: Hd1, a Major Photoperiod Sensitivity Quantitative Trait Locus in Rice, Is Closely Related to the Arabidopsis Flowering Time Gene CONSTANS
papers.authors: Yano M, Katayose Y, Ashikari M, Yamanouchi U, Monna L, Fuse T, Baba T, Yamamoto K, Umehara Y, Nagamura Y, Sasaki T
papers.note: Hd1 cloned as a CONSTANS ortholog; promotes heading under SD, represses under LD. Mechanism basis for SbCO / SbHd1 dual-role edges (already partially covered by E087/E095).

papers.title: Ehd2, a Rice Ortholog of the Maize INDETERMINATE1 Gene, Promotes Flowering by Up-Regulating Ehd1
papers.authors: Matsubara K, Yamanouchi U, Wang ZX, Minobe Y, Izawa T, Yano M
papers.note: Rice Ehd2 = ortholog of maize ID1 and sorghum SbID1. Ehd2 up-regulates Ehd1 and downstream Hd3a/RFT1 under both SD and LD; ehd2 mutants have 145-365 day flowering delays. Used for SbID1→SbEhd1 edge (E102).

papers.title: Hd1, a CONSTANS ortholog in rice, functions as an Ehd1 repressor through interaction with monocot-specific CCT-domain protein Ghd7
papers.authors: Nemoto Y, Nonoue Y, Yano M, Izawa T
papers.note: Hd1 and Ghd7 interact physically and jointly repress Ehd1 under LD. Mechanism for E092 (SbHd1→SbGhd7) evidence append.

papers.title: Natural variation in Ghd7 is an important regulator of heading date and yield potential in rice
papers.authors: Xue W, Xing Y, Weng X, Zhao Y, Tang W, Wang L, Zhou H, Yu S, Xu C, Li X, Zhang Q
papers.note: Founding Ghd7 paper. Ghd7 represses Ehd1 under LD → late flowering; suppresses Hd3a under LD but not SD. Mechanism reference appended to E029.
